seo.title: Astro Marketing Site - Fast, Modern, SEO-Friendly
seo.description: Build lightning-fast marketing sites with Astro. Static-first architecture with minimal dependencies and beautiful UI.

content.headline: Build Lightning-Fast Marketing Sites
content.text: Create beautiful, SEO-friendly static websites with Astro. Minimal dependencies, maximum performance.

content.headline: Why Choose Astro?
content.text: Everything you need to build modern marketing sites

items.title: Lightning Fast

items.title: Minimal Dependencies

items.title: Responsive Design

content.headline: Content Collections as Single Source of Truth
content.text: Edit content once in structured JSON files. Astro's content collections provide type-safe schemas and automatic validation. Your content stays organized and maintainable.

content.headline: Reusable Section Components
content.text: Build pages from a small set of battle-tested marketing sections. No need to reinvent the wheel for every page. Compose freely while staying consistent.

content.text: See what teams are saying about building with Astro

content.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
content.text: Everything you need to know about getting started

faqs.question: What is Astro?
faqs.answer: Astro is a modern static site generator that builds lightning-fast websites with minimal JavaScript. It's perfect for content-focused sites like marketing pages, blogs, and documentation.

faqs.question: Do I need to know React or Vue?
faqs.answer: No! While Astro supports framework components, this marketing site system uses only Astro components. They're similar to HTML but with extra features.

faqs.question: How do I edit content?
faqs.answer: Content lives in JSON files in the src/content/ directory. Edit these files to change copy, add sections, or create new pages. Templates stay separate.

faqs.question: Is it mobile responsive?
faqs.answer: Yes! All components use responsive CSS. One content source works for both mobile and desktop. No duplicate content needed.

faqs.question: Can I add custom sections?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Create new Astro components in src/components/sections/ and register them in the page router. Follow the existing patterns.

content.headline: Ready to Build Something Amazing?
content.text: Get started with Astro today and experience the future of static sites.
